'''jovafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylemian|xylemian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylemian|xylemian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jovafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovafithi|jovafithi]] || [[word:jovafiji|jovafiji]] || [[word:jovafishi|jovafishi]] || [[word:jovafiki|jovafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovafuthuthu|jovafuthuthu]] || [[word:jovafujuju|jovafujuju]] || [[word:jovafushushu|jovafushushu]] || [[word:jovafukuku|jovafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovafuthu|jovafuthu]] || [[word:jovafuju|jovafuju]] || [[word:jovafushu|jovafushu]] || [[word:jovafuku|jovafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovafufthuf|jovafufthuf]] || [[word:jovafufjuf|jovafufjuf]] || [[word:jovafufshuf|jovafufshuf]] || [[word:jovafufkuf|jovafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovafethe|jovafethe]] || [[word:jovafeje|jovafeje]] || [[word:jovafeshe|jovafeshe]] || [[word:jovafeke|jovafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovafothotho|jovafothotho]] || [[word:jovafojojo|jovafojojo]] || [[word:jovafoshosho|jovafoshosho]] || [[word:jovafokoko|jovafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovafotho|jovafotho]] || [[word:jovafojo|jovafojo]] || [[word:jovafosho|jovafosho]] || [[word:jovafoko|jovafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovafofthof|jovafofthof]] || [[word:jovafofjof|jovafofjof]] || [[word:jovafofshof|jovafofshof]] || [[word:jovafofkof|jovafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfthĂŻf|jovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfjĂŻf|jovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfshĂŻf|jovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfkĂŻf|jovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jovafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jovafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jovafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jovafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfthĂŻf|jovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfjĂŻf|jovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfshĂŻf|jovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfkĂŻf|jovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfthĂŻf|jovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfjĂŻf|jovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfshĂŻf|jovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jovafĂŻfkĂŻf|jovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jovafĂŠthĂŠ|jovafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jovafĂŠjĂŠ|jovafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jovafĂŠshĂŠ|jovafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jovafĂŠkĂŠ|jovafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jovafathatha|jovafathatha]] || [[word:jovafajaja|jovafajaja]] || [[word:jovafashasha|jovafashasha]] || [[word:jovafakaka|jovafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jovafatha|jovafatha]] || [[word:jovafaja|jovafaja]] || [[word:jovafasha|jovafasha]] || [[word:jovafaka|jovafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jovafafthaf|jovafafthaf]] || [[word:jovafafjaf|jovafafjaf]] || [[word:jovafafshaf|jovafafshaf]] || [[word:jovafafkaf|jovafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jovafasha|jovafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovafshĂ«asha|jovafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovafroasha|jovafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovafmuasha|jovafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovafyaasha|jovafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovafnkshĂ«asha|gojovafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovafnkroasha|gojovafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovafnkmuasha|gojovafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovafnkyaasha|gojovafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jovavafasha|jovavafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovavafshĂ«asha|jovavafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovavafroasha|jovavafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovavafmuasha|jovavafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovavafyaasha|jovavafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovavafnkshĂ«asha|gojovavafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovavafnkroasha|gojovavafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovavafnkmuasha|gojovavafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovavafnkyaasha|gojovavafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jevĂŠfasha|jevĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jevĂŠfshĂ«asha|jevĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jevĂŠfroasha|jevĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jevĂŠfmuasha|jevĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jevĂŠfyaasha|jevĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojevĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gojevĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojevĂŠfnkroasha|gojevĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojevĂŠfnkmuasha|gojevĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojevĂŠfnkyaasha|gojevĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jovfafasha|jovfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jovfafshĂ«asha|jovfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jovfafroasha|jovfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jovfafmuasha|jovfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jovfafyaasha|jovfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojovfafnkshĂ«asha|gojovfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojovfafnkroasha|gojovfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojovfafnkmuasha|gojovfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojovfafnkyaasha|gojovfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
